mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wms_merchandise WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND sold = #{sold}

SELECT m.id, m.group_id, m.cate_id, m.cost, m.price, m.imei, m.sold, m.created_at, c.id AS c_id, c.group_id AS c_group_id, c.parent_id AS c_parent_id, c.name AS c_name FROM wms_merchandise m LEFT JOIN wms_category c ON c.id = m.cate_id WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} AND m.sold = #{sold} ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_merchandise SET sold = #{sold} WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.group_id, m.cate_id, m.cost, m.price, m.imei, m.sold, m.created_at, c.id AS c_id, c.group_id AS c_group_id, c.parent_id AS c_parent_id, c.name AS c_name FROM wms_merchandise m LEFT JOIN wms_category c ON c.id = m.cate_id WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} AND m.sold = #{sold} AND (m.imei ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{text}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_merchandise (group_id, cate_id, cost, price, imei, sold, created_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{cateId}, #{cost}, #{price}, #{imei}, #{sold}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE wms_merchandise SET cost = #{cost}, price = #{price}, imei = #{imei} WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM wms_merchandise WHERE id = #{id} AND group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.name AS cate_name, COUNT(m.id) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN m.sold THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sold, SUM(m.cost) AS total_cost, SUM(m.price) AS total_price FROM wms_merchandise m JOIN wms_category c ON m.cate_id = c.id WHERE m.group_id = #{groupId} GROUP BY c.name
